intro.headline: Refactory
intro.subhead: Workflow automation for the Superprism stack

sections.headline: Describe the workflow you want
sections.body: Refactory turns a plain-language request into a durable workflow that can run on a schedule.
sections.consoleText: Create a new workflow to create a Daily Brief from community memory, run daily at 9am and send notification to discord.

sections.headline: Requests become workflows, tasks, and artifacts
sections.body: The Prism Site/API keeps intent, process, execution state, and outputs inspectable across retries and handoffs.

sections.headline: Community memory becomes operational context
sections.body: Refactory connects to Prism Memory so briefs can pull from transcripts, digests, artifacts, and historical activity.

sections.headline: Watch the workflow move through the board
sections.body: Async workers run the process, store outputs, and return links that can be delivered back to the community.

outro.headline: Refactory for Superprism
outro.body: Create repeatable workflows from community memory, agent execution, and durable Prism artifacts.
